items.desc_en: Australian Wagyu, hand-sliced paper-thin. Watch the marbling bloom and dissolve in seconds in the bubbling broth. Order twice — you will want to.
items.desc_zh: 澳洲和牛，手切薄如蟬翼。看著油花在沸騰的湯底中瞬間綻放溶化。一份不夠——你一定會再點。
items.quote_en: "The finest beef needs only fire and ten seconds."
items.quote_zh: 「最好的牛肉，只需要火與十秒鐘。」

items.desc_en: Inner Mongolia lamb, sliced in neat rosettes. Sweet and rich in the Ma La broth.
items.desc_zh: 內蒙古羊肉，切成精緻卷形。在麻辣湯底中香甜馥郁。

items.desc_en: A harder-working cut with more flavour. Tender when the broth is right.
items.desc_zh: 口感紮實，滋味更豐厚。湯底到位，嫩而不柴。

items.desc_en: Plucked live, delivered whole. Oceanic and impossibly fresh.
items.desc_zh: 現撈即送，完整呈現。海洋的鮮甜，無可比擬。
